ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Background references are public: ACGS and PSE sustainability roadmaps, and NPC advisories on breach thresholds; these sources do not contain IBHC-specific events.

must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential internal memo — Isla Bay Holdings Corp. (IBHC) — Legal & Compliance; for restricted circulation under SRC and PSE disclosure rules.
Subject: Pre-SEC (PH) Form 17-C assessment — cyber incident at payroll e-wallet vendor and proposed sustainability-linked note/token pilot; trading blackout and insider-list actions.
On 28 May 2026, vendor KapaKoin Remit Services reported anomalous API calls affecting a staging environment; preliminary logs suggest up to 212 contractor records (name + corporate email only) may have been viewable, with no access to payroll banks or IDs; containment achieved, NPC notice decision pending within 72 hours.
Per Data Privacy Act, identity is not directly ascertainable beyond internal HR cross-reference; sample HR File IDs: HR-Φ-00291, HR-Ψ-77420; DPO contact: dpo@isla-bay.com.ph; no government identifiers or salary transfers occurred.
Treasury is negotiating a non-public term sheet with Paracan Securities, Inc. for a PSE-tapped sustainability-linked note (SLN) and a limited pilot of tokenized depository participations on the ChainMayumi network; initial pricing 6.35% with 25bp step-up if 2027 Scope 2 target missed.
An insider-list has been opened per SRC Rule 12: Mr. Rafael L. Quimpo (CFO) r.quimpo@isla-bay.com.ph, Atty. Lira D. Sison (CorpSec) corpsec@isla-bay.com.ph, Ms. J. Borromeo (ESG), Engr. Victor Y. P—ProcOps, and Ms. T. Magat (Paracan) under NDA-GL-B8x; additions require Compliance sign-off.
Information barriers remain in effect: research, treasury, HR, and the IslaPay retail app team are ring-fenced; wall-crossing logs must be signed before access; no selective disclosure to analysts or chat groups; inquiries via compliance@isla-bay.com.ph.
Recommend a trading blackout for directors, officers, and covered employees effective 29 May 2026 until two full trading days after any Form 17-C cyber update and SLN pricing announcement; tipping is prohibited, including to family or household staff.
Key commercial terms (draft): 90-day lock-up; make-whole at PH T-bill +50bp; KPI verification by BayanThirdParty LLP; bookrunner discretionary clawback 10%; see http://deal.isla-bay.com/ESG?doc=SLN_v0_9&rid=gR33n for redline.
